content.cn_text: 你好，伊芙，进来坐下……最近怎么样?
content.en_text: Hello Eve, come in and sit down ... How's it going?

content.cn_text: 很好谢谢。
content.en_text: Fine thanks.

content.cn_text: 我期待着下周的教学实习。
content.en_text: I'm looking forward to my teaching practice next week.

content.cn_text: 好。
content.en_text: Good.

content.cn_text: 现在你们有两个班了，对吧——三年级和六年级。
content.en_text: Now you've got two classes, haven't you - Year 3 and Year 6.

content.cn_text: 你完成教案了吗?
content.en_text: Have you done your lesson plans?

content.cn_text: 嗯，我决定以可再生能源为主题…
content.en_text: Well, I've decided to take the topic of renewable energy ...

content.cn_text: 我还没有制定六年级的课程计划，但我想我应该以一个非常简单的技术例子为基础。所以我带来了这个图表给你们看…
content.en_text: I haven't done a lesson plan for Year six yet, but I thought I'd base their lesson on an example of very simple technology.So I've brought this diagram to show you ...

content.cn_text: 我从网上找到的。
content.en_text: I got it from the Internet.

content.cn_text: 让我看看……一个沼气厂……
content.en_text: Let's see ... A biogas plant ...

content.cn_text: 这是用有机废物生产燃料的设备吗?
content.en_text: So this is equipment for producing fuel from organic waste?

content.cn_text: 是的。
content.en_text: Yes.

content.cn_text: 左边的小容器是用来放收集到的垃圾的。
content.en_text: The smaller container on the left is where you put the waste you've collected ...

content.cn_text: 对，然后从那里用管道输送到更大的水箱里?
content.en_text: Right, and from there it's piped into the larger tank?

content.cn_text: 这是正确的。
content.en_text: That's right.

content.cn_text: 那是大罐底部的浆液。
content.en_text: And that's slurry on the base of the larger tank.

content.cn_text: 对吧……泥浆到底是什么?
content.en_text: Right ... and what exactly is slurry?

content.cn_text: 它是有机废物和水的混合物。
content.en_text: It's a mixture of organic waste and water.

content.cn_text: 所以底部的管子就是水进来的地方吗?
content.en_text: So is that pipe at the bottom where the water comes in?

content.cn_text: 是的，它是……当泥浆混合物被消化时，它会产生气体，气体会上升到圆顶的顶部。
content.en_text: Yes it is ... As the slurry mixture digests it produces gas, and that rises to the top of the dome.

content.cn_text: 然后，当需要的时候，它可以被输送出去，作为家庭或工厂的燃料。这很简单。
content.en_text: Then when it's needed it can be piped off for use as fuel in homes or factories.It's very simple.

content.cn_text: 我想应该有某种安全阀来防止压力积聚吧?
content.en_text: I suppose there's some kind of safety valve to prevent pressure build-up?

content.cn_text: 那是溢出水箱。
content.en_text: That's the overflow tank.

content.cn_text: 右边的那个容器。
content.en_text: That container on the right.

content.cn_text: 当浆液膨胀时，一些会流入其中，然后一旦一些气体通过管道排出，浆液的液位又会下降，溢流罐又会清空。
content.en_text: As the slurry expands some of it flows into that, and then once some of the gas has been piped off, the slurry level goes down again and the overflow tank empties again.

content.cn_text: 我明白了。
content.en_text: I see.

content.cn_text: 我认为这对这个年龄段的人来说很简单。
content.en_text: Well I think that's suitably simple for the age level it's for.

content.cn_text: 我期待着看到整个教案。
content.en_text: I look forward to seeing the whole lesson plan.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thanks.

content.cn_text: 我能向你展示一下我对三年级课程的想法吗?
content.en_text: And can I show you my ideas for the Year three lesson?

content.cn_text: 当然可以。
content.en_text: Of course.

content.cn_text: 让我们看。
content.en_text: Let's look.

content.cn_text: 我想我应该在黑板上写下“能量”这个词来介绍这个话题，并加强拼写和发音。
content.en_text: I thought I'd introduce the topic by writing the word 'energy' on the board, and reinforcing the spelling and the pronunciation.

content.cn_text: 然后我会做一个小的哑剧——你知道的，在现场表演什么的——来传达这种感觉。
content.en_text: Then I'll do a little mime - you know, run on the spot or something - to convey the sense.

content.cn_text: 在这个阶段，我会简短地说……
content.en_text: I'd keep it brief at this stage ...

content.cn_text: 是的，我会的。
content.en_text: Yes, I will.

content.cn_text: 然后我把这个词擦掉，写下这个问题“能量从哪里来?”，看看学生们能想出什么。
content.en_text: Then I'll wipe the word off and write the question 'Where does energy come from?', and see what the pupils come up with.

content.cn_text: 很好。
content.en_text: Fine.

content.cn_text: 我建议你在这个阶段进行头脑风暴，不要拒绝他们的任何建议。
content.en_text: I'd suggest that you just brainstorm at this stage, and don't reject any of their suggestions.

content.cn_text: 是的，这就是我要做的……然后我写了一组简单的陈述，比如“能量使汽车在路上行驶”，“能量使我们的身体生长”。
content.en_text: Yes, that's what I was going to do ... Then I've produced a set of simple statements,like 'Energy makes cars move along the road', and 'Energy makes our bodies grow'.

content.cn_text: 总共有八个。
content.en_text: There are eight altogether.

content.cn_text: 你会把它们作为讲义发给大家吗?
content.en_text: Are you going to give them out as a handout?

content.cn_text: 还是写在黑板上?
content.en_text: Or write them up on the board?

content.cn_text: 首先，我把它们写在黑板上，然后大声念出来。
content.en_text: First, I'll put them on the board, and then I'll read them out loud.

content.cn_text: 我让学生们把它们抄在笔记本上。
content.en_text: And I'll get the pupils to copy them out in their note books.

content.cn_text: 我还会让他们自己再想出一个类似的说法，并把它添加到列表中。
content.en_text: I'll also ask them to think up one more similar statement by themselves, and add it to the list.

content.cn_text: 好主意。
content.en_text: Good idea.

content.cn_text: 伊芙:在那之后，我想我可以通过贴一些照片来改变一些东西……比如太阳、植物、食物、汽油和奔跑的孩子。
content.en_text: Eve: After that I thought I'd vary things a bit by sticking some pictures up ... of things like the sun and plants and food, and petrol, and a running child.

content.cn_text: 我会让学生们根据能量链，计算出图片的顺序。
content.en_text: And I'll get the pupils to work out what order the pictures should come in, in terms of the energy chain.

content.cn_text: 导师:我认为这是个好主意。
content.en_text: Tutor: I think that's a very good idea.

content.cn_text: 当学生给你指路时，你可以移动这些图片。
content.en_text: You could move the pictures around as the pupils give you directions.

content.cn_text: 伊芙:是的，我想他们会喜欢的。
content.en_text: Eve: Yes, I think they'd enjoy that.

content.cn_text: 最后，我做了一个填空练习。
content.en_text: And to finish off I've made a gap-fill exercise to give out.

content.cn_text: 他们会一个一个地写，当他们写的时候，我会去看看他们的工作。
content.en_text: They'll be doing that individually, and while they're writing I'll walk round and check their work.

content.cn_text: 导师:很好……那你想好时间了吗?
content.en_text: Tutor: Good ... And have you worked out the timing of all that?

content.cn_text: 它可能会带你一直走到最后。
content.en_text: It'll probably take you right through to the end of the .

groups.desc:
Questions 21-25
You will hear a trainee teacher called Eve talking to her university tutor about her preparations for teaching practice.
Label the diagram below.
Write the correct letter, A-G, next to questions 21-25 below.

items.title: Waste container
items.analysis: 正确答案是C，因为听力文本明确指出“左边的小容器是你放置废物的地方”，图中C位置正是左边的小容器。

items.title: Slurry
items.analysis: 文中明确提到“slurry on the base of the larger tank”，即较大罐体底部的浆液。图中标记为G的位置正好是较大罐体的底部，因此答案是G。

items.title: Water inlet
items.analysis: 文中明确提到“pipe at the bottom where the water comes in”，结合图示，底部的管道标记为A。因此，第23题的正确答案是A。

items.title: Gas
items.analysis: 因为听力原文明确提到“the top of the dome”，而图示中E标注的位置正是沼气池的顶部。通过定位词“top”和信号词“top of the dome”，可以准确找到答案。

items.title: Overflow tank
items.analysis: 因为原文中明确提到“overflow tank”是“container on the right”，并且描述了其功能，即浆液膨胀时会流入其中，气体被输送出去后浆液水平会下降，溢流罐会再次清空。所以答案是F。

groups.desc:
Questions 26-30
Complete the flow chart below.
Choose FIVE answers from the box and write the correct letter, A-G, next to questions 26-30.

items.title: Teacher:
items.analysis: 文中提到老师将通过做一个小小的哑剧表演，比如原地跑步，来传达"energy"这个概念的意思。这种方法正是通过动作来演示意义，完全符合选项D "Demonstrate meaning"的描述。这种教学方法既视觉化又动态化，能够有效地帮助学生理解抽象概念。

items.title: Teacher:
items.analysis: 正确答案是G (Present sentences)，因为教师明确提到她制作了一组简单的陈述句来呈现给学生。这些句子是关于能源的，如"Energy makes cars move along the road"和"Energy makes our bodies grow"。教师制作这些句子的目的就是为了在课堂上呈现给学生，这正是"Present sentences"的含义。

items.title: Pupils: and expand
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是C. Copy，因为原文中明确提到教师会让学生将句子抄写到笔记本中。这个动作直接对应了选项C中的"Copy"。题干要求选择学生要进行的活动，而抄写正是学生在这个环节中需要执行的主要任务。

items.title: Pupils:
items.analysis: 正确答案是A (Identify sequence)，因为原文中提到教师会让学生确定图片的顺序（"work out what order the pictures should come in"）。这个活动明确要求学生识别能量链的顺序，与"Identify sequence"的描述最为吻合。这种活动不仅要求学生理解能量链的概念，还需要他们能够将不同的能量形式或来源按照正确的顺序排列，这正是"identify sequence"所描述的过程。

items.title: Teacher:
items.analysis: 正确答案是E（Distribute worksheet），因为原文中提到教师制作了一份"gap-fill exercise"（填空练习）并准备"give out"（分发）。这明确表示教师将在课程结束时分发一份工作表。此外，"They'll be doing that individually"（学生们将独立完成）进一步证实了这是一份要分发给学生的练习。
